title: quercus douglasii var. ransomii
intro: Quercus douglasii var. ransomii, also known as Ransom's oak or Douglas oak, is a variety of evergreen tree native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Quercus douglasii var. ransomii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
